new_claims.claim_text: Mujtaba Khamenei is officially dead, confirmed by Iran.
new_claims.notes: Claim from X post. Web search shows highly conflicting reports from late Feb/early March 2026 regarding the death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and/or injury/death/succession of his son Mojtaba Khamenei. No clear, recent confirmation from Iran regarding Mojtaba Khamenei's death. This claim is highly contested and appears to be part of a broader, confused, or intentionally misleading narrative.
